testcase.name: test_get_user_pets
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_service_flow_soul_score.py:113: in test_get_user_pets first_pet = pets[0] ^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 0

testcase.name: test_mira_chat_creates_service_flow
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_service_flow_soul_score.py:149: in test_mira_chat_creates_service_flow assert response.status_code == 200, f"Chat request failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Chat request failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","message"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"input":"I need help with grooming for Mojo, can you book an appointment?","pet_context":{"id":"pet-99a708f1722a","name":"Mojo","breed":"Indie","age":"Unknown"},"session_id":"test_session_1770651856.126477","conversation_history":[]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_attach_or_create_ticket_endpoint

failure.message:
AssertionError: Pillar should be Grooming assert 'Celebrate' == 'Grooming'
- Grooming + Celebrate

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_service_flow_soul_score.py:279: in test_attach_or_create_ticket_endpoint assert ticket_data.get("pillar") == "Grooming", "Pillar should be Grooming" E AssertionError: Pillar should be Grooming E assert 'Celebrate' == 'Grooming' E E - Grooming E + Celebrate

testcase.name: test_soul_score_increments_on_chat
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_service_flow_soul_score.py:382: in test_soul_score_increments_on_chat assert response.status_code == 200, f"Chat failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Chat failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","message"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"input":"Tell me about treats for Mojo","pet_context":{"id":"pet-99a708f1722a","name":"Mojo","breed":"Indie","age":"Unknown"},"session_id":"soul_test_1770651856.659153","conversation_history":[]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_soul_score_in_api_response
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_service_flow_soul_score.py:418: in test_soul_score_in_api_response if p.get("id") == pet_id: ^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'
